title: Cancel or change app plan on behalf of a customer

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description of request
Allow app developers to initiate an app upgrade or cancellation on behalf of a customer.

Current workaround/impact
We have to send them to the Billing or Plan Selection page and hope they figure it out on their own. There’s no guarantee that the user will successfully upgrade or cancel.

Original request from @samicaracand

posts.author: samicaracand (Sami Caracand (DocuGen))
posts.cookedHtml: Big +1 from me and my team
